_doc: Cohort bundles (stabilization step 5, 2026-07-10) — THE machine-readable version of the
/eval-vlm cohort table. Consumers: eval_all.sh --cohort/COHORT= (expands to all VO_* env
vars; explicit VO_* overrides win), run cards (expected_n), and — future — the compiler's
floors. Add a new cohort HERE (all fields) before any eval references it; eval_all
hard-fails on an unknown cohort instead of guessing GT (the reasoner_sweep P2.2 rule).
n = FULL test-split rep count (per-run subsets like the gtobsbuild build's 2157 are
recorded per-run in the card, not here).

aux_testsets._doc: Aux-task (multimodal) test banks — cohort-orthogonal (VO cohorts above don't apply). 'current' names the bank every NEW board aux run must use; the compiler's 'Aux Test Set' column labels each row from run_id markers (aux2906/testset_2906 vs 1506). Legacy 1506 rows stay on the board labeled as such.

2906.note: CURRENT (re-baseline 2026-07-10). Run via eval_multimodal_post_sft.sh --testset-2906; include an 'aux2906' token in RUN_ID so the board classifies it explicitly. ⚠ 6 metadata cols empty on all rows (matched_exercise_*, pain_bucket, question_category, session_mode) — scoring unaffected, backfill owed by merged_aux_datasets owner.

1506.note: LEGACY (V2-era standard since 2026-06-17). Superseded by 2906 for new runs; existing board rows remain.

1105.note: SUPERSEDED bank — use only for deliberate comparison against historical 1105 rows.

1806.note: CURRENT cohort (2906 schema), min-1s FILTERED (2026-07-10 re-baseline: raw 2260 -> 2245, 15 sub-second reps dropped, same duration cutoff as the derived SFT sets). Raw source: 1806_after_format_review_diverse_reasoning/repetitions_test. Pre-re-baseline results (expected_n 2260/2157) are superseded.
